title: ocimum basilicum var. bullatum
intro: Ocimum basilicum var. bullatum, also known as Bullatum Basil, is a variety of sweet basil, a popular herb in the Lamiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of essential oils such as eugenol and linalool. The health benefits of Ocimum basilicum var. bullatum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
